state.output:
<file>
00001| import { getAddress, isAddress } from 'viem'
00002| 
00003| /**
00004|  * Get multiple logo URLs to try in order
00005|  * All URLs are HTTPS to avoid CORS/Mixed Content issues in Farcaster Mini Apps
00006|  */
00007| export function getTokenLogoFallbacks(
00008|   address: string | null | undefined,
00009|   chainId: number,
00010|   symbol?: string
00011| ): string[] {
00012|   // Native token logos - use chain-specific logos from TrustWallet
00013|   if (!address || address === 'native') {
00014|     const nativeLogos: Record<number, string> = {
00015|       // Ethereum - use TrustWallet's native ETH logo
00016|       1: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/ethereum/info/logo.png',
00017|       // Base - uses ETH as native token
00018|       8453: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/base/info/logo.png',
00019|       // Arbitrum - uses ETH as native token
00020|       42161: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/arbitrum/info/logo.png',
00021|       // Polygon - uses MATIC as native token
00022|       137: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/polygon/info/logo.png',
00023|       // Optimism - uses ETH as native token
00024|       10: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/optimism/info/logo.png',
00025|     }
00026|     return [nativeLogos[chainId] || 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/ethereum/info/logo.png']
00027|   }
00028| 
00029|   const logos: string[] = []
00030|   const lowerSymbol = symbol?.toLowerCase()
00031| 
00032|   // 1. Symbol-based from cryptocurrency-icons (HTTPS, most reliable for major tokens)
00033|   if (lowerSymbol) {
00034|     logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/${lowerSymbol}.png`)
00035|   }
00036| 
00037|   // 2. TrustWallet (HTTPS, good coverage, requires checksummed address)
00038|   // Chain-specific paths as per TrustWallet documentation
00039|   const chainNames: Record<number, string> = {
00040|     1: 'ethereum',
00041|     8453: 'base',
00042|     42161: 'arbitrum',
00043|     137: 'polygon',
00044|     10: 'optimism',
00045|   }
00046|   
00047|   const chainName = chainNames[chainId]
00048|   if (chainName && isAddress(address)) {
00049|     try {
00050|       const checksummed = getAddress(address)
00051|       logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/${chainName}/assets/${checksummed}/logo.png`)
00052|     } catch (e) {
00053|       // If checksum fails, try lowercase
00054|       logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/${chainName}/assets/${address}/logo.png`)
00055|     }
00056|   }
00057| 
00058|   return logos
00059| }
00060| 
</file>
